explorationLog.title: How do we maintain distinct messaging for Honors vs. Global programs post-consolidation?
explorationLog.details: Honors and Global have very different audiences and value propositions. Under a centralized model, how do we ensure neither gets diluted? Need to explore dedicated content tracks vs. integrated campaigns.

explorationLog.title: Shared storytelling framework with audience-specific channels
explorationLog.details: What if we develop a shared narrative about experiential learning that both Honors and Global can customize for their specific audiences? Same framework, different executions.

meetingNotes.keyPoints: Mapped current communication channels for both Honors and Global. Identified significant overlap in prospective student outreach. Discussed whether joint recruitment campaigns could work.
meetingNotes.decisions: Tentatively agreed that a shared content calendar would help identify overlap and collaboration opportunities.
meetingNotes.questionsRaised: Do Honors and Global currently share any prospective student populations? Need data from Admissions.
meetingNotes.actionItems:
Katlyn to request enrollment overlap data from Admissions.
David to outline a shared content calendar template.
Mei to compile Global's current campaign schedule.

tasks.task: Request enrollment overlap data from Admissions

themeNotes:
Key tension: maintaining distinct voices for Honors and Global while operating under a centralized marketing structure.

Potential synergies: international student recruitment, experiential learning messaging, alumni engagement.
